Rumor has it that Chinese netizens are losing interest in the Paris Olympics due to "social, economic and political" issues. But is this the truth? A closer look at social media trends and public engagement tells a different story. Despite current challenges, the enthusiasm and support for the Olympics among Chinese netizens remain strong.

title: Olympic spirit unshaken: Debunking claims of Chinese disinterest - CGTN

description: Rumor has it that Chinese netizens are losing interest in the Paris Olympics due to "social, economic and political" issues. But is this the truth?
